without doubt.example: Without doubt, honesty is the most important quality in a person.
without doubt.exampleCn: 毫无疑问，诚实是一个人最重要的品质。

at a low price.example: We bought fresh vegetables at a low price from the local market.
at a low price.exampleCn: 我们以低价从当地市场买了新鲜蔬菜。

notice sb do.example: Did you notice him do his homework carefully last night?
notice sb do.exampleCn: 你注意到他昨晚认真做作业了吗？

all of a sudden.example: All of a sudden, the rain stopped and the sun came out.
all of a sudden.exampleCn: 突然，雨停了，太阳出来了。

make sb.example: A true friend will never make sb feel small or unimportant.
make sb.exampleCn: 真正的朋友永远不会让某人感到渺小或不重要。

in history.example: The Great Wall is one of the greatest wonders in history.
in history.exampleCn: 长城是历史上最伟大的奇迹之一。

play indoors.example: When it rains heavily, children have to play indoors.
play indoors.exampleCn: 下大雨时，孩子们不得不在室内玩。

on the same team.example: Being on the same team means we win and lose together.
on the same team.exampleCn: 在同一个队意味着我们一起赢一起输。

the safety of.example: We must protect the safety of every student at school.
the safety of.exampleCn: 我们必须保护学校里每个学生的安全。

the aim of.example: The aim of education is to help people think for themselves.
the aim of.exampleCn: 教育的目的是帮助人们独立思考。

dream of.example: I dream of traveling to every province in China one day.
dream of.exampleCn: 我梦想有一天能去中国的每个省份旅行。

not only...but also.example: She is not only smart but also kind to everyone around her.
not only...but also.exampleCn: 她不但聪明，而且对周围的每个人都很友善。

a number of.example: A number of students volunteered to clean the park last Sunday.
a number of.exampleCn: 上周日许多学生自愿去打扫公园。

look up to.example: I look up to my elder brother because he never gives up.
look up to.exampleCn: 我钦佩我的哥哥，因为他从不放弃。

encourage sb to do sth.example: Good parents always encourage their children to do sth creative.
encourage sb to do sth.exampleCn: 好的父母总是鼓励他们的孩子做一些有创意的事情。

hand computer.example: A hand computer makes it easy to study anywhere you like.
hand computer.exampleCn: 掌上电脑让你可以在任何地方轻松学习。

be used to.example: Bamboo can be used to build houses, bridges, and furniture.
be used to.exampleCn: 竹子可以被用来建造房屋、桥梁和家具。

save us a lot of.example: Online shopping can save us a lot of time during busy weeks.
save us a lot of.exampleCn: 在忙碌的几周里，网购可以节省我们许多时间。

with the help of.example: With the help of my classmates, I finished the project on time.
with the help of.exampleCn: 在同学们的帮助下，我按时完成了项目。

in short.example: In short, hard work and kindness will lead you to success.
in short.exampleCn: 总之，努力工作和善良会带你走向成功。

license.example: You need a driver's license before you can drive on the road.
license.exampleCn: 你需要驾照才能在道路上驾驶。

earring.example: My mother wore a beautiful pearl earring to the party.
earring.exampleCn: 我妈妈戴了一只美丽的珍珠耳环去参加聚会。

cry.example: It is okay to cry when you feel sad or hurt inside.
cry.exampleCn: 当你感到悲伤或内心受伤时，哭是可以的。

poem.example: Li Bai wrote a famous poem about the bright moon long ago.
poem.exampleCn: 李白很久以前写了一首关于明月的著名诗篇。

society.example: A peaceful society depends on the kindness of its people.
society.exampleCn: 一个和平的社会取决于其人民的善良。

support.example: My parents always support my dream of becoming a teacher.
support.exampleCn: 我的父母总是支持我成为一名教师的梦想。

safety.example: Road safety is important for both drivers and walkers.
safety.exampleCn: 道路安全对司机和行人都很重要。

smoke.example: Smoking is harmful to your health and the people around you.
smoke.exampleCn: 吸烟对你和你周围人的健康有害。

pierce.example: The sharp needle can pierce through thick cloth easily.
pierce.exampleCn: 锋利的针可以轻松刺穿厚布。

badly.example: After the accident, his leg was badly hurt for two weeks.
badly.exampleCn: 事故发生后，他的腿严重受伤了两个星期。

awful.example: The awful smell from the kitchen made everyone leave the room.
awful.exampleCn: 厨房里难闻的气味让所有人都离开了房间。

teen.example: Being a teen means learning to balance fun and responsibility.
teen.exampleCn: 十几岁意味着学会平衡乐趣和责任。

regret.example: I regret not spending more time with my grandparents.
regret.exampleCn: 我后悔没有花更多时间陪我的祖父母。

educate.example: Schools educate students not just in books but in life skills.
educate.exampleCn: 学校不仅教育学生书本知识，还教育生活技能。

manage.example: She managed to finish the race even though she felt tired.
manage.exampleCn: 尽管她感到很累，她还是设法完成了比赛。

enter.example: Please enter the room quietly so you do not disturb others.
enter.exampleCn: 请安静地进入房间，以免打扰他人。

choice.example: Life is full of choices, and each one shapes who we become.
choice.exampleCn: 生活充满了选择，每一个都塑造了我们成为什么样的人。

talk back.example: It is rude to talk back to your parents when they are advising you.
talk back.exampleCn: 当父母劝告你时，顶嘴是不礼貌的。

keep...away from.example: Parents should keep children away from dangerous roads.
keep...away from.exampleCn: 父母应该让孩子远离危险的道路。

make one's own decision.example: Growing up means learning to make one's own decision wisely.
make one's own decision.exampleCn: 成长意味着学会明智地自己做决定。

get in the way of.example: Fear should not get in the way of your dreams and goals.
get in the way of.exampleCn: 恐惧不应该妨碍你的梦想和目标。

mange to do sth.example: He managed to do sth amazing by practicing every single day.
mange to do sth.exampleCn: 他通过每天练习，成功做成了令人惊叹的事情。

driver's license.example: I hope to get my driver's license when I turn eighteen.
driver's license.exampleCn: 我希望在十八岁时拿到驾照。

sb be allowed to do.example: Students should be allowed to do creative projects in class.
sb be allowed to do.exampleCn: 学生应该被允许在课堂上做创意项目。

lift up.example: Working together, we can lift up those who have fallen down.
lift up.exampleCn: 齐心协力，我们可以扶起那些跌倒的人。

be excited about.example: I am excited about the school trip to the science museum.
be excited about.exampleCn: 我对学校去科学博物馆的旅行感到兴奋。

stay by one's side.example: A true friend will stay by your side through good and bad times.
stay by one's side.exampleCn: 真正的朋友会在好时光和坏时光都陪伴在你身边。

give sb a lift.example: My neighbor gave me a lift to school when it was raining.
give sb a lift.exampleCn: 下雨时，我的邻居让我搭便车去学校。

think back to.example: I often think back to the happy days of my childhood.
think back to.exampleCn: 我经常回忆我童年的快乐日子。

end up as.example: If you work hard, you might end up as a great scientist.
end up as.exampleCn: 如果你努力工作，你最终可能会成为一名伟大的科学家。

achieve one's dream.example: With patience and effort, anyone can achieve one's dream.
achieve one's dream.exampleCn: 只要有耐心和努力，任何人都能实现自己的梦想。

have nothing against.example: I have nothing against playing games as long as homework is done.
have nothing against.exampleCn: 只要作业完成了，我不反对玩游戏。

lift.example: Teamwork can lift a heavy burden that one person cannot bear.
lift.exampleCn: 团队合作可以举起一个人无法承受的沉重负担。

chance.example: Everyone deserves a chance to prove themselves and grow.
chance.exampleCn: 每个人都应该有机会证明自己并成长。

education.example: Good education opens doors to a brighter future for all.
education.exampleCn: 良好的教育为所有人打开了通往更光明未来的大门。

make one's decision.example: It is important to make one's decision based on careful thought.
make one's decision.exampleCn: 基于深思熟虑自己做决定是很重要的。

have nothing against sth.example: She has nothing against sth new as long as it helps people learn.
have nothing against sth.exampleCn: 只要有助于人们学习，她不反对新事物。

Whose.example: Whose book is this on the desk? It looks very interesting.
Whose.exampleCn: 桌上这本书是谁的？它看起来很有趣。

outdoors.example: Playing outdoors is good for children's health and happiness.
outdoors.exampleCn: 在户外玩耍对孩子的健康和快乐有好处。

suit.example: He wore a dark blue suit to his graduation ceremony.
suit.exampleCn: 他穿着一套深蓝色的西装参加毕业典礼。

mystery.example: The mystery of the old temple attracted historians from everywhere.
mystery.exampleCn: 这座古庙的神秘事件吸引了来自各地的历史学家。

leader.example: A good leader listens to others before making important choices.
leader.exampleCn: 一个好的领导在做重要选择之前会倾听他人的意见。

position.example: Please tell me your position so I can find you quickly.
position.exampleCn: 请告诉我你的位置，这样我可以快速找到你。

enemy.example: Understanding is the best way to turn an enemy into a friend.
enemy.exampleCn: 理解是把敌人变成朋友的最好方式。

attend.example: All students must attend the flag-raising ceremony every Monday.
attend.exampleCn: 所有学生每周一都必须参加升旗仪式。

anybody.example: Anybody can learn English well with enough practice and patience.
anybody.exampleCn: 只要有足够的练习和耐心，任何人都能学好英语。

happening.example: The strange happening in the village made everyone curious.
happening.exampleCn: 村里发生的奇怪事件让每个人都很好奇。

noise.example: Too much noise in the classroom makes it hard to concentrate.
noise.exampleCn: 教室里太多的噪音让人难以集中注意力。

policeman.example: The policeman helped the old lady cross the busy street safely.
policeman.exampleCn: 警察帮助老太太安全地穿过繁忙的街道。

uneasy.example: I felt uneasy about the exam because I did not study enough.
uneasy.exampleCn: 我对考试感到不安，因为我没有充分学习。

sleepy.example: The warm afternoon sun made everyone feel sleepy in class.
sleepy.exampleCn: 温暖的午后阳光让每个人在课堂上都感到困倦。

express.example: Art allows us to express feelings that words cannot describe.
express.exampleCn: 艺术让我们能够表达言语无法描述的情感。

Britain.example: Britain has a long and rich history that fascinates many visitors.
Britain.exampleCn: 英国有着悠久而丰富的历史，吸引着许多游客。

receive.example: I was happy to receive a letter from my old friend last week.
receive.exampleCn: 上周收到老朋友的来信我很高兴。

historian.example: The historian spent years studying ancient Chinese culture.
historian.exampleCn: 这位历史学家花了多年时间研究中国古代文化。

midsummer.example: Midsummer in Yunnan is the perfect time to enjoy outdoor festivals.
midsummer.exampleCn: 云南的仲夏是享受户外节日的最佳时间。

medical.example: Medical workers are true heroes who save lives every day.
medical.exampleCn: 医务人员是真正的英雄，他们每天拯救生命。

prevent.example: Washing hands often can prevent the spread of many diseases.
prevent.exampleCn: 经常洗手可以阻止许多疾病的传播。

energy.example: Solar energy is a clean power source that protects our planet.
energy.exampleCn: 太阳能是一种清洁的能源，保护我们的地球。

burial.example: The ancient burial site teaches us about life thousands of years ago.
burial.exampleCn: 古老的墓葬遗址教会我们几千年前的生命。

honor.example: It is a great honor to represent our school in the competition.
honor.exampleCn: 代表我们学校参加比赛是一种极大的荣誉。

ancestor.example: We should remember our ancestor and learn from their wisdom.
ancestor.exampleCn: 我们应该记住我们的祖先，并从他们的智慧中学习。

victory.example: The victory belonged not to one person but to the whole team.
victory.exampleCn: 胜利不属于一个人，而是属于整个团队。

belong to.example: These traditional songs belong to the cultural treasure of our nation.
belong to.exampleCn: 这些传统歌曲属于我们国家的文化瑰宝。

pop music.example: Pop music from the 1990s still sounds fresh and meaningful today.
pop music.exampleCn: 90年代的流行音乐今天听起来仍然新鲜而有意义。

favorite writer.example: Mo Yan is my favorite writer because his stories are so powerful.
favorite writer.exampleCn: 莫言是我最喜欢的作家，因为他的故事非常有力。

toy truck.example: The little boy was excited to get a red toy truck for his birthday.
toy truck.exampleCn: 小男孩生日得到一辆红色玩具卡车很兴奋。

hair band.example: She wore a colorful hair band to keep her hair neat during sports.
hair band.exampleCn: 她戴了一条彩色发带，在运动时保持头发整齐。

attend a concert.example: I hope to attend a concert by my favorite band next year.
attend a concert.exampleCn: 我希望明年参加我最喜欢乐队的音乐会。

something valuable.example: Time with family is something valuable that money cannot buy.
something valuable.exampleCn: 与家人共度的时光是金钱买不到的宝贵东西。

go to a picnic.example: We plan to go to a picnic by the lake this weekend.
go to a picnic.exampleCn: 我们计划这个周末去湖边野餐。

the rest of.example: Please share the rest of the cake with your classmates.
the rest of.exampleCn: 请把剩下的蛋糕分享给你的同学。

pick up.example: Please pick up the litter to keep our campus clean.
pick up.exampleCn: 请捡起垃圾，保持我们的校园清洁。

used to be.example: This old building used to be a school for village children.
used to be.exampleCn: 这座老建筑曾经是乡村儿童的学校。

something unusual.example: The detective noticed something unusual about the broken window.
something unusual.exampleCn: 侦探注意到破碎的窗户有些不寻常的地方。

strange noises.example: We heard strange noises coming from the old house at night.
strange noises.exampleCn: 晚上我们听到老房子里传来奇怪的声音。

outside the window.example: A beautiful bird sat outside the window, singing a lovely song.
outside the window.exampleCn: 一只美丽的鸟坐在窗外，唱着动听的歌。

call the policemen.example: If you see danger, do not hesitate to call the policemen.
call the policemen.exampleCn: 如果你看到危险，不要犹豫报警。

the next-door neighbor.example: The next-door neighbor often brings us fresh vegetables from his garden.
the next-door neighbor.exampleCn: 隔壁的邻居经常从花园里给我们带来新鲜蔬菜。

at first.example: At first, I found English difficult, but now I enjoy it.
at first.exampleCn: 起初，我发现英语很难，但现在我很喜欢它。
